title: Quicreate Mod
description: This is the main patch for the Quicreate Skyblock Modpack! Adds items and compatibility for Create, Cataclysm, Ad astra, etc.
body:
This is the primary patch mod for the Quicreate Modpack!

[https://modrinth.com/project/quicreate-skyblock](https://modrinth.com/project/quicreate-skyblock)

Adds recipes and compatability related to Create, Create New Age, Ad Astra, Cataclysm, and more!
Also contains new items and tools to smooth out the difficulty curve and add more progression.

Expands circuit lineup from create new age

Cataclysm structures spawn on specific planets instead

Create technologies and expansions progress through game stages

Changed some lang files for immersion

More I forgot about, I've been messing with this on and off for a while now.


This mod has A LOT of dependencies, and is very specialized for this modpack.
